title: FHIR ResearchStudy/eligibility export + OMOP mapping doc
context: To enable downstream adoption, the dataset exports to a HL7 FHIR ResearchStudy/eligibility profile and ships an OMOP-CDM mapping document. This is interoperability tooling (low risk) that surfaces the structured data in standard formats. The export is validated against the eligibility schema and the FHIR profile.
objective: Build a FHIR ResearchStudy/eligibility export and publish an OMOP-CDM mapping document for the structured eligibility dataset.
acceptanceCriteria: Records export to a HL7 FHIR ResearchStudy/eligibility profile (Vulcan/EBM-on-FHIR aligned).
An OMOP-CDM mapping document is published.
Export is validated against the eligibility schema and the FHIR profile.
Not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels are preserved in exported artifacts.
resources: HL7 FHIR ResearchStudy / EBM-on-FHIR; OHDSI OMOP CDM
